Class ModalOperatorSV

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.Modality.Kind
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.JModality.JavaModalityKind
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.ModalOperatorSV
All Implemented Interfaces:
Named, Operator, ParsableVariable, SortedOperator, SchemaVariable, Sorted, SyntaxElement, TerminalSyntaxElement
public final class ModalOperatorSV extends JModality.JavaModalityKind implements SchemaVariable
Schema variable matching modal operators.

  • Method Details

    • getModalities

      public ImmutableSet<JModality.JavaModalityKind> getModalities()
      returns an unmodifiable set of operators this schemavariable can match

    • toString

      public @NonNull String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Modality.Kind

    • isStrict

      public boolean isStrict()
      Specified by:
      isStrict in interface SchemaVariable
      Returns:
      true if the schemavariable has the strict modifier which forces the instantiation to have exactly the same sort as the schemavariable (or if the sv is of generic sort - the instantiation of the generic sort)

      Specified by:

      public @NonNull Sort sort()

      the sort of the entity

    • arity

      public int arity()
      Description copied from interface: Operator
      the arity of this operator
      Specified by:
      arity in interface Operator

    • sort

      public @NonNull Sort sort(@NonNull Sort @NonNull [] sorts)
      Description copied from interface: Operator
      Determines the sort of the Term if it would be created using this Operator as top level operator and sub terms of sorts sorts. The assumption that the constructed term would be allowed is not checked.
      Specified by:
      sort in interface Operator
      Parameters:
      sorts - an array of Sort containing the sort of the subterms of a (potential) term with this operator as top level operator
      Returns:
      sort of the term with this operator as top level operator of the given substerms

    • bindVarsAt

      public boolean bindVarsAt(int n)
      Description copied from interface: Operator
      Tells whether the operator binds variables at the n-th subterm.
      Specified by:
      bindVarsAt in interface Operator

      Specified by:

      public boolean isRigid()
      Description copied from interface: Operator
      Tells whether the operator is rigid.
      Specified by:
      isRigid in interface Operator

    • validTopLevelException

      public <T extends Term> void validTopLevelException(T term) throws TermCreationException
      Description copied from interface: Operator
      Checks whether the top level structure of the given @link Term is syntactically valid, given the assumption that the top level operator of the term is the same as this Operator. The assumption that the top level operator and the term are equal is NOT checked.
      Specified by:
      validTopLevelException in interface Operator
      Throws:
      TermCreationException - if a construction error was recognised
